Everything You Need

Powerful Features for Your Health

WeCare+ brings essential healthcare tools together
to help you and your loved ones stay safe and informed.

Emergency Assistance

One-tap emergency help connects you to medical services fast.

Nearby Hospitals

Find hospitals near you using real-time GPS with distance and directions.

Symptom Checker

Search symptoms, explore possible conditions and get health insights.

Personal Health Profile

Store your medical information securely and manage your health data.

Support & Help

Get answers, contact support, report issues and access helpful resources.

Emergency Help

Tap to get immediate assistance

Everything you need,
in one app.

WeCare+ brings essential healthcare services to your fingertips. Fast, reliable, and designed for you.

  • Real-time location & hospital finder
  • Al-powered symptom checker
  • Secure health information storage
  • Appointment booking & reminders
  • 24/7 Support & guidance

Your data is encrypted and completely secure with us.

Made for Everyone

Simple, intuitive, and designed for all age groups.
